name: eclipticam
night_layout_notes: day/YYYY-MM-DD/<cam>/HH/NNNN.jpg (UTC date); night/YYYY-MM-DD/<cam>/HH/NNNN.fits.fz (noon-rollover night date). HHb/ siblings hold 2x2 sum-binned frames.

v1.pedestal_notes: Sensor black level in libcamera's 16-bit container — measured 2026-06-12 as the minimum mean of all deep-night (00:00-03:00 UTC) frames across 1 night of v1 data. Use as fixed zero point so 'stops above pedestal' is comparable across nights.
v1.plate_scale_notes: OV5647 stock lens, 53.50 deg horizontal / 2592 px (official RPi figure).
v1.max_single_exposure_notes: picamera2 video-config ceiling ~3.07 s; longer integrations must use the streaming coadd path.

v3w.pedestal_notes: Sensor black level in libcamera's 16-bit container — measured 2026-06-12 as the minimum mean across deep-night (00:00-03:00 UTC) frames from 3 nights of v3w data. Slightly above the documented IMX708 black level (~4096) due to dark current. Use as fixed zero point so 'stops above pedestal' is comparable across nights.
v3w.plate_scale_notes: Module 3 Wide, 102 deg horizontal / 2304 px at the half-res capture mode in use (native 4608x2592).
